zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Barley Sheriff of Essex於1425年出生在英國賀特福爾時，他的父親Sir John Barley35歲，母親Lady Catherine De Walden31歲。他於大約1450年與Anne Colvill在英國英格蘭賀特福爾阿爾布瑞結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1475年1月5日在英國賀特福爾阿爾布瑞享年50歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀特福爾普頓哈姆聖 馬也斯 亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Barley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Barley. Those in Lancashire and Yorkshire are named with Old English bār ‘wild boar’ or bere ‘barley’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. A place of the same name in Hertfordshire has as its first element an unattested Old English byname Be(o)ra (from bera ‘bear’).

English: metonymic occupational name for a grower or seller of barley, from Middle English barli, barlich ‘barley’ (Old English bærlic, originally an adjective derivative of bær ‘barley’, a byform of bere).
Americanized form of South German Behrle or of its Swiss German cognates Beerli, Berli, or Berly, and probably also of some other similar (like-sounding) surname. Compare Berley .

variants.name: Behrle
meanings: South German (Württemberg): from a pet form of Behr ‘bear’, including from a pet form of an ancient Germanic personal name formed with Old High German bero ‘bear’.
Altered form of Norwegian Berle: habitational name from a farmstead in the county of Sogn og Fjordane, so named with Old Norse barth ‘rim, edge’.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Barley Sheriff of Essex was born in 1425, in Hertfordshire, England, his father, Sir John Barley, was 35 and his mother, Lady Catherine De Walden, was 31. He married Anne Colvill about 1450, in Albury, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died on 5 January 1475, in Albury, Hertfordshire, England, at the age of 50, and was buried in St Mary's Churchyard, Puttenham, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

Il a épousé Anne Colvill environ 1450, à Albury, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 5 janvier 1475, à Albury, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à St Mary's Churchyard, Puttenham, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.St Mary's Churchyard Albury, East Hertfo: 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 풋텐함 스트 마이'스 처르c히아어드
ko.lifeSummary: Henry Barley Sheriff of Essex(이)가 1425년 영국 허트퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Barley(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Catherine De Walden(은)는 31세였다. 그는 대략 1450년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 알버이에서 Anne Colvill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1475년 1월 5일 영국 허트퍼드실르 알버이에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 풋텐함 스트 마이'스 처르c히아어드에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Anne Colvill aproximadamente 1450, em Albury, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. ru.St Mary's Churchyard Albury, East Hertfo: ст мэри'с чурчярд, путтенам, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Barley Sheriff of Essex родился в 1425 г. в местности хиртфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Barley было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Catherine De Walden, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Colvill около 1450 г. в местности албури, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер 5 января 1475 г. в местности албури, хиртфордшир, Англия в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности ст мэри'с чурчярд, путтенам, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Barley Sheriff of Essex nació en 1425, en Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Barley, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Lady Catherine De Walden, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Anne Colvill aproximadamente 1450, en Albury, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 5 de enero de 1475, en Albury, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en St Mary's Churchyard, Puttenham, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
